compiled_state.title: Create gate signal schema contract document
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
Create plugins/dso/docs/contracts/gate-signal-schema.md defining the shared output interface for all classification gates (1a, 1b, 2a, 2b, 2c, 2d). Follow established contract pattern (Signal Name, Emitter, Parser, Schema table, Example, Failure Contract, Versioning).

Schema fields: gate_id (string, gate identifier e.g. "1a"), triggered (boolean, whether gate fired), signal_type (enum: "primary"|"modifier"), evidence (string, human-readable evidence summary), confidence (enum: "high"|"medium"|"low").

Emitter: Each gate script (plugins/dso/scripts/gate-*.sh or inline in fix-bug SKILL.md).
Parser: Escalation router (Story a2f0-9641).

Include a Consumers section listing the gate stories that must conform: 6775-b635 (1a), 5260-e9ba (1b), e965-7cb7 (2a, 2d), e7a0-b991 (2c), 2c25-5751 (2b).

test-exempt: Unit exemption criterion 3 — static assets only (Markdown documentation). No executable assertion is possible.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Contract file exists at plugins/dso/docs/contracts/gate-signal-schema.md
  Verify: test -f plugins/dso/docs/contracts/gate-signal-schema.md
- [ ] Contract contains all required schema fields
  Verify: grep -q 'gate_id' plugins/dso/docs/contracts/gate-signal-schema.md && grep -q 'triggered' plugins/dso/docs/contracts/gate-signal-schema.md && grep -q 'signal_type' plugins/dso/docs/contracts/gate-signal-schema.md && grep -q 'evidence' plugins/dso/docs/contracts/gate-signal-schema.md && grep -q 'confidence' plugins/dso/docs/contracts/gate-signal-schema.md
- [ ] Contract follows project pattern (Emitter, Parser, Schema, Example, Failure Contract sections)
  Verify: grep -q '## Emitter' plugins/dso/docs/contracts/gate-signal-schema.md && grep -q '## Parser' plugins/dso/docs/contracts/gate-signal-schema.md && grep -q '## Schema' plugins/dso/docs/contracts/gate-signal-schema.md
- [ ] Contract includes Consumers section listing gate stories
  Verify: grep -q '## Consumers' plugins/dso/docs/contracts/gate-signal-schema.md

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 3/6: Tests written (none required — static asset) ✓
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
